sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18552" key="a)fugh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφῠγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">φυγεῖν</etym>) <sense id="n18552.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without strength to flee,</tr_> Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4024.tlg001:72:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">72.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
